name: Volgogradenergosbyt Public Joint-Stock Company RUB0.12 PRF(RUB)
summary: Volgogradenergosbyt Public Joint-Stock Company RUB0.12 PRF(RUB) is a Russian energy company engaged in the distribution and sale of electricity. The company provides electricity to residential, commercial, and industrial customers in the Volgograd region. Volgogradenergosbyt is based in Russia.
